title: Document entity (ONT-E-17)
description: A source document (regulation, paper, accident report, manual, internal note). Documents are the resolution targets for source.document_id URIs (PROV-03, PROV-06). Composes entity.base.schema.json (which composes _meta.schema.json#/$defs/baseFields). Schema version: 0.1.0.

title_text.description: Document's title-of-record (the actual title as printed on the document). Distinct from i18n.label which is the human-readable display label — title_text preserves the canonical title string in case it differs (e.g. doc title is English-only but i18n provides ZH translation).

doc_type.description: Document category. 'regulation' = government rule (FAR/CS); 'standard' = SDO standard (ATA, S1000D, ISO); 'paper' = peer-reviewed academic; 'report' = research/test report; 'manual' = OEM manual or AMM; 'accident_report' = NTSB/AAIB-style; 'internal_note' = team memo / internal expert note. Per DOC-02.

language.description: Primary language of the document. 'mixed' = bilingual or multi-section ZH/EN content.

source_url.description: Optional. Canonical source URL where the document was retrieved (e.g. FAA eCFR link, arXiv URL, OEM portal URL).

publication_date.description: Optional. ISO-8601 date of publication / first issue.

effective_date.description: Optional. ISO-8601 date when the document became effective (e.g. regulation amendment effective date). May differ from publication_date.

confidentiality.description: DOC-04 confidentiality classification. 'public' = open access (FAA eCFR, arXiv); 'internal' = internal-team only; 'restricted' = NDA / customer-controlled; 'itar_ear' = ITAR/EAR-controlled defense data. Phase 4 ingestion gate enforces routing rules based on this field — defaulting to public is unsafe, so this field is REQUIRED.

domain_tags.description: Optional. Free-form kebab-case domain tags (e.g. 'airworthiness', 'cfd-validation', 'flight-test'). Distinct from the entity-base 'tags' field which is generic faceting; domain_tags scope to document-domain context.

document_version.description: Optional. Document's own intrinsic version string (e.g. 'Issue 6.0', 'Amendment 25-145', 'Rev D'). Named 'document_version' rather than 'version' to avoid collision with entity-base integer 'version' counter (which tracks our own record-revision per D-15).

file_hash.description: Optional. SHA-256 content hash of the source file, prefixed 'sha256:'. Used for integrity audit and dedup.

page_count.description: Optional. Total page count of the source document.

ata_chapter_tags.description: Optional. ATA iSpec 2200 chapter codes this document covers. Validated against ontology/vocabularies/ata-chapters.yaml at runtime by Phase 3 validator. Pattern here is structural only; enum membership is loaded dynamically.

processed_by.description: Optional. Identifier of the ingestion tool / pipeline that processed this document (e.g. 'ragflow-opendataloader-pdf', 'docling-3.0', 'manual-pandoc-3.x').

s1000d_dmc.description: **Reserved field —** S1000D Issue 6 Data Module Code (Issue 6.0 released 2024-09-01). Currently used only as opaque identifier for future round-tripping; structural decomposition into 7 components deferred to v0.2.0+. Format: DMC-<modelId>-<sysDiff>-<sns>-<disasm>-<infoCode>-<itemLoc>[_<learn>][_<lang>]. Example: DMC-S1000DBIKE-AAA-D00-00-00-00AA-00PA-D_004-00_EN-US. See ontology/mappings/s1000d-dmc-reserved.md for the full structural decomposition.
